title: Extra Polish [CTM]
description: Changes the glass texture to have a less intrusive border. All glass textures are compatible with CTM! (requires optifine or continuity for fabric)
body:
# Overview
Extra Polish is a simple resource pack that changes the intrusive border on glass to a more cohisive line. The resource pack is also CTM compatible, meaning that glass textures will be connected for modded users! **(Connected textures requires optifine or continuity for fabric)**
## Extra Info:
Feel free to use Extra Polish to learn how to make your own resource pack if you wish.

### Notice:
Extra Polish should work on most versions of the game, even if they are not specified.
